prestazioni: Engine swap to a 2.8L 12v VR6 (AAA engine code) with a Schrick 268° camshaft, 3.2L VR6 intake manifold (12v-specific), and a custom 4-2-1 stainless steel header by Supersprint paired with a Milltek Sport 2.5" cat-back exhaust system featuring quad 45mm tips for optimal scavenging and a deep, raspy tone unique to the Harlequin's short wheelbase.

Forced induction via a Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger (0.63 A/R turbine housing) with a custom VR6-specific cast-aluminum intake manifold by Integrated Engineering, mated to a Precision Turbo wastegate (46mm, 38mm port) and a TiAL MV-R 50mm blow-off valve. Intercooling handled by a custom front-mount setup using a GReddy Type-S intercooler core (600x300x76mm) with CNC-machined aluminum end tanks for the Harlequin's unique bumper cutouts.

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (VW-specific valving, 40mm front/36mm rear piston diameter) paired with Eibach Pro-Spacer wheel spacers (20mm front, 25mm rear) to correct the Harlequin's factory scrub radius. Polyurethane bushings upgraded to Powerflex Black Series (85A durometer) for the subframe, control arms, and trailing arms, with a Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (22mm) to mitigate the car's inherent torque steer under boost.
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V1 widebody conversion (Golf Mk3-specific, not Mk4) with custom Harlequin-color-matched fiberglass fenders (original panel colors retained in a patchwork pattern on the inner flares), paired with a custom carbon fiber hood by Seibon (vented, 3-piece design) featuring a central NACA duct for intercooler airflow.

OEM+ Harlequin-themed interior with Recaro SRD-E seats (Mk3 Golf shell-specific) upholstered in Nappa leather with Alcantara inserts, color-matched to the original Harlequin palette (Laguna Blue, Tornado Red, Pistachio Green, Chagall Blue). Custom door cards by Eurokraft with matching color-blocked leather and Alcantara, featuring embroidered "Harlequin" script in the original VW font.

Wheel setup: BBS RS-GT II (17x9 +25 ET, 5x100 PCD) with custom center caps color-matched to the Harlequin panels, wrapped in Nankang AR-1 semi-slick tires (225/40/17) for track use. Brake system upgraded to StopTech Big Brake Kit (328mm front rotors, 4-piston calipers) with Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with stainless steel braided lines by Goodridge and Motul RBF660 brake fluid.
